perceptualHash.algorithm: 64-bit horizontal difference hash over ImageMagick-normalized 9x8 sRGB grayscale pixels
perceptualHash.failureRule: distinct files with Hamming distance less than or equal to the threshold fail QA and are reported as scene pairs
